zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz於大約1390年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 包晨瓦豪時，他的父親Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz32歲，母親Mrs. nn von Bieberstein26歲。他於大約1415年與von Koeckritz在德國薩辛可萊斯 萊格馬爾可利波格瓦豪結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz于大约1390年出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 包晨瓦豪时，他的父亲Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz32岁，母亲Mrs. nn von Bieberstein26岁。他于大约1415年与von Koeckritz在德国薩辛可萊斯 萊格馬爾可利波格瓦豪结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Marschall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Hedwig, Juergen, Reinhard, Theresia, Wilfried.

German: occupational name for a man in the service of a member of the nobility, originally one who looked after the horses, Middle High German marschalc (from mar(c) ‘noble horse’ + schalk ‘servant’). In time the term came to be used for a military rank or a certain court official. Compare Marshall .
English: variant of   Marshall  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Marshall
meanings: English: usually an occupational name ‘farrier’, occasionally a status name ‘chief official of a royal household or court; a high officer of state’, from Middle English mareshal and Old French maresc(h)al. An even wider range of meanings is found in some other languages: compare for example Polish Marszałek (see Marszalek ). This name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century. It is also borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz was born about 1390, in Wachau, Bautzen, Saxony, Germany, his father, Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz, was 32 and his mother, Mrs. nn von Bieberstein, was 26. He married von Koeckritz about 1415, in Wachau, Markkleeberg, Leipzig, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz est né environ 1390, à Wachau, Kreis Bautzen, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs. nn von Bieberstein, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé von Koeckritz environ 1415, à Wachau, Markkleeberg, Kreis Leipzig, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles.

Er hat um 1415 in Wachau, Markkleeberg, Kreis Leipzig, Sachsen, Deutschland von Koeckritz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter.

Lui sposato von Koeckritz circa 1415, nel Wachau, Markkleeberg, Kreis Leipzig, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie.

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz(이)가 대략 1390년 독일 작센 크레이스 바천 와차우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich Marschall von Mockritz(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. nn von Bieberstein(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1415년 독일 작센 크레이스 레이p지그 마k클리버그 와차우에서 von Koeckritz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

Он женился на женщине по имени von Koeckritz около 1415 г. в местности вачао, маркклибирг, крис липзиг, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей.
